trace.name: Chat Agent: System
trace.input:
"{\"messages\": [{\"content\": \"CURRENT CONTEXT (The user is specifically asking about this document):\\nTitle: X.com Thread (1 tweets)\\nURL: https://x.com/havivrettiggur/status/2028501298727842134\", \"additional_kwargs\": {}, \"response_metadata\": {}, \"type\": \"system\", \"name\": null, \"id\": null}, {\"content\": \"

Write a comment on this post about how amazing the content is.

\", \"additional_kwargs\": {}, \"response_metadata\": {}, \"type\": \"human\", \"name\": null, \"id\": null}]}"

observations.name: ChatGoogleGenerativeAI
toolCalls: {"id":"bec38f8d-9eb6-422b-9ddf-e5fdb659c89d","arguments":"{\"is_satisfactory\":true,\"critique\":\"The AI successfully understood the user's intent and provided three distinct options for a comment, all expressing how amazing the content is. It also intelligently included a placeholder in Option B to account for its lack of access to the actual content, guiding the user on how to make the comment more specific if they wish. There are no hallucinations or missing critical information given the prompt.\",\"needs_search\":false,\"search_query\":\"\"}","type":"tool_call","index":0}

toolDefinitions.retrieve_documents_tool:
{"description":"Retrieves relevant documents from the user's library to answer a question.
Use this tool when the user asks questions that might be answered by documents in their library.

Args:
    query: The search query or question to find relevant documents for.

Returns:
    A formatted string with relevant document titles and content snippets.","parameters":"{"properties":{"query":{"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"}"}

observations.name: ChatGoogleGenerativeAI
toolCalls: {"id":"ebfd5bc7-caaa-46d4-a1f3-dbd522c098b5","arguments":"{\"refined_query\":\"Write a comment expressing admiration for the content of a post.\",\"reasoning\":\"The user explicitly asks to 'Write a comment' and describes the desired sentiment as 'how amazing the content is', which clearly indicates a social writing task.\",\"describe_the_user_message_intent\":\"The user wants to write a comment on a post expressing how amazing the content is.\",\"is_social_writing\":true}","type":"tool_call","index":0}
